scene_title: Rolo de Ezequiel com palavra GOG

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.focal_point: a quill pen writing the word GOG in dramatic crimson at the top

mood.emotion: the naming of Gog in scripture

symbolism.secondary: crimson word GOG as call of judgment
